---
title: "Decisions"
description: "Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for RenderBrains."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, description, date]
---

Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) documenting significant technical choices: what was decided, why, and what alternatives were considered.

ADRs are immutable once merged. Superseded decisions are marked `archived` and linked to their replacement.

---

::: {.callout-note}
Decisions are published from `vault/` via `make sync`. To log a new decision, create a note in `vault/` with `category: "decisions"`, `type: "decision"`, and `publish: true`.
:::
